calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Mar-17-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kathleen Marie Naumann, Petitioner (via Zoom).

Ms. Naumann presented details regarding her son's disappearance and presumed death from the Golden Gate Bridge approximately eleven years ago. She requested a court determination of death and issuance of a death certificate. Ms. Devlin noted that despite searches and investigations by authorities and a private investigator retained by her son's employer (Yahoo!), her son's body was never recovered. She stated that her son had sent emails to friends indicating his intention to end his life. The court acknowledged receipt and review of the documents submitted in support of the petition and took the matter under submission.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Mar-03-2025 Continued To Mar-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
